dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*
Come on, cheer up, Raiha-chan.
Raiha? What's wrong?
Ah, big bro.
Hey, Nino, did something happen?
Oh, yeah.\nWe were just looking at the aquarium guidebook,\nwondering what kind of creatures were here...
They don't have penguins in this aquarium.
Ahhh...\nI see, that's too bad.\nYou do love penguins, after all, don't you, Raiha.
Yeah, I was looking forward to seeing them...
But, since they don't have penguins,\nwe should enjoy seeing all the other animals.
Yeah, for sure.
Raiha-chan's such a good girl.
Heh, isn't she?
Anyway, I can't believe there are no penguins\nin such a big aquarium like this.
Churaumi Aquarium is said to have a theme\nbased on the seas around Okinawa.
Oh, I see.\nThey have a clear concept.
The most famous attraction here is the whale shark.\nYou should be able to see one\nthat's about ten meters long.
Whaaa?! They have such a big shark?!
There are also plenty of fish here\nthat we didn't see when we went snorkeling yesterday.
Tropical fish are so colorful and cute.\nI'd like to take a close look at them.
Oh, speaking of which!
When I was at the market this morning,\nI saw some colorful fish I've never seen before\nlined up. I was really surprised.
I saw them too.\nThe atmosphere was completely different\nfrom the shops we usually go to.
I wonder what kind of dish they use those fish for.\nHave you ever cooked with them, Nino-san?
No, I haven't.\nIn fact,\nit was my first time seeing them sold like that.
That's surprising.\nI thought you would have used them before\nsince you make such fancy dishes.
Your impression of my cooking is a bit off,\nisn't it, Fu-kun.
Besides, you know, if the color is too flashy,\npeople might hesitate to eat it.
Nah, you won't know until you try it.
Well, I suppose.
Since you only eat and don't cook, big bro,\nmaybe you think that way? When cooking,\nyou can't help but be aware of that.
Browsing markets while traveling is surprisingly fun.\nI discovered so many new things.
Yeah, I think so as well.\nEven though we live in the same country,\nwe eat many different things, don't we.
I understand how you feel. With such flashy colors,\nit's hard not to be conscious of the fish\nas something to appreciate.
That's right. Even if you bought it to cook,\nonce you start thinking about it like that,\nit's a little hard to shake off.
Well, that's my personal opinion anyway.
I wonder if people from\nOkinawa are okay with cooking it?
Maybe it's just because we're not used to seeing it.\nThe fish is familiar to Okinawans,\nso they probably wouldn't have the same feeling as us.
That's true. Anyway,\nwe should always show respect for our ingredients.
Browsing markets while traveling is surprisingly fun.\nI discovered so many new things.
Yeah, I think so as well.\nEven though we live in the same country,\nwe eat many different things, don't we.
But the fish are probably delicious\nonce you've eaten them once, huh.\nWhy else would they be lined up at the market.
I wonder what they taste like?
We may have already eaten some of these fish.\nWe've had several meals since arriving in Okinawa.
Oh, right. There should be a market\nwhere they clean and serve the fish you buy right there.
I-is that the live seafood I heard\nso much about?!\nBig bro, that's so luxurious!
Yeah, Raiha! I'm getting so pumped!
That much, eh?\nI don't think it's that luxurious.
Rich folk!\nYou rich snobs!
Browsing markets while traveling is surprisingly fun.\nI discovered so many new things.
Yeah, I think so as well.\nEven though we live in the same country,\nwe eat many different things, don't we.
I think it would be even more fun\non a trip abroad. Next time, in addition to enjoying\nlocal cuisine, let's try experiencing local ingredients.
Traveling abroad, huh...\nI hope we can go someday.
I'm sorry, Raiha!\nI'll take you anywhere you want to go someday!
Huhh? Don't worry about it.
WHAT?! WHY?!
Big bro, isn't there someone for you to take\nbefore you take me?
Huh...
Teehee, that's right.
(Wait, why did she have to bring that up now...)
W-well, I'll take a look around here for a bit.
Wait. I'll go with you.
So, hold on... I was gonna go investigate the\naquarium,\nso could you stay with Raiha for a little longer?
Raiha, don't cause Nino too much trouble.
Alrighty.
